differentials.name: Cutaneous horn =  conical projection of keratin above skin surface that may grow rapidly
differentials.raw: Cutaneous horn =  conical projection of keratin above skin surface that may grow rapidly

context: √  uni- / bilateral DDx:   malignancy (developing over a few months) √  spherical with central area of lucency (associated with glands + hair follicles) √  nonspecific in association with sutures, fat necrosis, intraductal papilloma, Paget disease, intraductal ca. DDx:   squamous cell carcinoma, Paget disease, sebaceous adenoma, granular cell tumor
